title: McCarthy Tétrault Employer Advisor
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Employer Advisor
Keeping employers up to date on labour and employment law developments in Canada
This blog covers all aspects of our national practice, including occupational health and safety, human rights, hiring, disability management, performance management, dismissals, employment standards, immigration, privacy, pensions and benefits, collective bargaining, labour relations and everything else that impacts the workplace. We post on interesting developments and, more importantly, provide comments on practical strategies and best practices that can apply to the workplace.
- Corporate Governance
- Financial Institutions Regulatory
- Litigation and Dispute Resolution
- Pay & Employment Equity
- Pensions, Benefits, & Executive Compensation
- Securities Litigation
- Securities Regulation and Investment Products
- White Collar Defence and Investigations
